title: 人生记事簿：Life Memoirs
description:
Life is a journey that can never be replayed.



Life Memoirs is a life simulation and future speculation game told through the pages of a diary. Born in China, you will grow up alongside a rapidly changing society, recording your life one year at a time.



From childhood to old age, from school to work, from family life to personal dreams, every year brings new choices, challenges, and memories.



Experience modern Chinese culture and everyday life through major milestones such as education, career paths, social expectations, family relationships, and historical changes. Witness how ordinary people navigate a transforming world while searching for meaning, stability, and happiness.



As technology advances, artificial intelligence, automation, and new social systems begin reshaping work, wealth, education, and human identity itself.



Every choice leaves a mark.



Every year becomes a memory.



Life Memoirs does not try to predict a single future.



Instead, it invites you to explore many possible futures—and reflect on what gives life value when the world around us is constantly changing.



Years later, when you open your diary again, you may discover that you were not only witnessing one person's life.



You were witnessing an era.

FEATURES



• Live an entire lifetime through a diary-based narrative



• Experience modern Chinese culture, society, and everyday life



• Make meaningful choices that shape your future



• Explore multiple careers, relationships, and life paths



• Witness the rise of AI and the transformation of society



• Discover branching stories inspired by real-world trends



• Reflect on identity, purpose, and human value in a changing world



• Create your own unique life story
description_short: A choice-driven text game about living an ordinary life in modern China. Shape your path through study, work, love, and family, and see how your future unfolds year by year.
